description: You are a Clinical Data Manager. A protocol amendment (Amendment 3) for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024) requires you to restructure the visit schedule in OpenClinica. Login to OpenClinica (username: 'root', password: 'Admin123!') and ensure the active study is 'Phase II Diabetes Trial'. Remove the 'Follow-up Visit' event definition and create four new event definitions: 'Week 4 Safety Assessment' (Scheduled, non-repeating, description: 'Week 4 safety labs and vital signs assessment per Amendment 3.'), 'Week 12 Efficacy Evaluation' (Scheduled, non-repeating, description: 'Primary efficacy endpoint evaluation at Week 12.'), 'Unscheduled Safety Visit' (Unscheduled, repeating, description: 'Unscheduled visit for adverse event evaluation or safety concern.'), and 'End of Treatment Visit' (Scheduled, non-repeating, description: 'Final treatment visit with comprehensive safety and efficacy evaluation.'). Do not modify or remove the existing 'Baseline Assessment' event definition.
